✦ Welcome to Our Community

Living the Orthodox Faith

Saint Mary Coptic Orthodox Church is a place of prayer, worship, fellowship, and spiritual growth for families in Des Moines, Iowa.

New visitors can learn what to expect, view the schedule, and book an appointment with Abouna.
